absorption: ASK Absorption at session vPOC (~61300). High positive delta failed to push price higher, indicating buyers were absorbed by passive sellers.
dom_observation: Significant stacked asks visible above 61350, particularly at 61400, while the bid side is thin, confirming selling pressure.
reasoning: Fiyat, yuksek pozitif delta ile seans vPOC'sine ulasmasina ragmen yukselise devam edemedi ve bu seviyeden reddedildi; bu durum, agresif alicilarin pasif saticilar tarafindan absorbe edildigini gosteren net bir ASK Absorption sinyalidir.
